title: ursinia anthemoides subsp. anthemoides
intro: Ursinia anthemoides subsp. anthemoides, also known as the yellow daisy or bitter daisy, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to southern Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Some of the health benefits of Ursinia anthemoides subsp. anthemoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
